items.title: Dune: Part Two (2024)
items.summary: Denis Villeneuve's epic continuation of the Dune saga follows Paul Atreides as he unites with the Fremen to wage war against House Harkonnen. Stunning visuals and a gripping story make this one of the finest sci-fi films in years. A must-watch on the biggest screen possible.

items.title: Severance — Apple TV+
items.summary: A psychological thriller series where employees have their work and personal memories surgically separated. Season 2 has been widely praised as one of the best TV shows in recent memory. Deeply unsettling, beautifully crafted, and endlessly thought-provoking.
